这本太好看了我非常喜欢，有爽点有笑点就是没有毒点😋😋作者还听建议
但是300章怎么就这样被我看完了[哭][哭]一天不看浑身难受"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1767880214,"group_id":"7545048389856005144","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"义勇义勇义勇义勇义勇义勇义勇义勇义勇义勇义勇义勇义勇义勇义勇","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9C75TKgIAYABKbk1jF2pI19/i7FVcy4jeJ+PPBHFgbe","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/2d2b282ed4584ed988065fd2f204209e~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776614693&x-signature=%2BzqiMRZEx8KZbo1TRqrbiIKzDuw%3D","user_id":"2824026744700205","user_name":"✞ʚ义勇重度依赖ɞ✟"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2824026744700205","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7545048389856005144","book_info":{"abstract":"【乐子文，主角没节操没下限】
穿越到哈利波特世界，查理·怀特绑定了【昏君系统】
只要做出昏君行为，就能获得昏君点，无限抽奖！
当赫敏在图书馆啃着课本时。
【叮！陛下在课堂上睡觉的身姿，简直是胡亥在世，完美符合“不理朝政”昏君行为！奖励昏君点+100！】
当哈利和罗恩为了魁地奇刻苦训练时。
【叮！陛下挥霍无度，购买了对角巷所有甜品，符合“奢靡享乐”昏君行为！奖励昏君点+500！】
查理随手就是一个十连抽！
【恭喜陛下获得：阿尼马格斯（自选形态）！自由天赋点+1，厉火咒熟练度+1000...】
邓布利多：“怀特先生是我见过最有天赋的学生，可惜他就是不爱学习……”
伏地魔：“为什么？我苦心钻研的黑魔法，他打个哈欠就学会了？！”
查理躺在沙发上，无奈地叹了口气：“我也不想啊，可是系统它给得太多了！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0d612bd78158fe09b9688e2233a412d5","author":"木一洋","author_id":"","book_id":"7545048389856005144","book_name":"哈波：上课睡觉，魔咒自动满级","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202010","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"15.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1016,"name":"男频衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1016&name=男频衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":516,"name":"都市异能","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=516&name=都市异能&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7545079379462717976","read_count":"150682","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"982524"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.2","serial_count":"441","tags":"男频衍生,系统,穿越,都市异能,同人,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/3cef4e34372fcaaaa95a3a7c9477189b~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779287654&x-signature=ptX1tI9RihWf%2Beb8NL2XBwq%2Bzt4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4058985442055783","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"449"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321223414054E7C0614C64A09BA2A"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读19小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":
